post.subject: Meah
post.body:
Every get the feeling that if you died or (more likely) didnt communicate with anyone for a while many people wouldnt give a shit or wouldnt try contacting you? 


Didnt think so. 

I do....

comments.body:
Id notice
Instantly

Chris
xx

P.S. Joanne finally stopped puking (lovely imagery) - I felt like a proper doctor.
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
